snippet.title: Tidepool Field Notes
snippet.description:
Field clips, R tips, and intertidal odds and ends from a marine biology grad student in Tacoma, WA. Mostly tide pools and the occasional how-I-did-this-in-RStudio. Uploads whenever the tide and the thesis allow.

PNW intertidal ecology, science communication, and a little cooking when the lab day runs long.

channel.title: Tidepool Field Notes
